About

A creative media production house.

From concept to final cut — video production, editing, and digital content built to help brands and creators stand out.

Yolo House Productions is a creative media production house dedicated to crafting powerful visual stories. We believe in creating content that connects, converts, and inspires — turning ideas into engaging videos and visuals that make your brand impossible to ignore.

"Because you only live once — so your content should be unforgettable."

18+ Years Industry Experience 6 Awards — ACEF & Sound Boom, 2024 New York Festivals Nominee
Founder

Meet RJ Pratik.

18+ years in media — from radio jockey to award-winning programming head to founder.

Prateek Mehra — "RJ Pratik"Founder, Yolo House Productions

Prateek Mehra has spent over 18 years in the media industry, specializing in radio programming and content creation. He served as Regional Programming Head at Radio City (Uttar Pradesh), and his path runs from founding and managing his own theatre group to working as a Radio Jockey with Big FM and Red FM until 2016. Alongside radio, he has written stories for short films released on MX Player and Hungama, and directed a music single video — carrying his storytelling across formats.

Expertise

What we do.

Six areas of focus, one end-to-end team — from first script to final delivery.

01
Content Creation
Original ideas turned into engaging videos and visuals built for how audiences actually watch today.
02
End-to-End Production
Script, casting, location, shoot, edit, delivery — one team handling every stage of the project.
03
Documentaries
Long-form storytelling for brands, institutions, and causes that need more than a 30-second ad.
04
Micro & Vertical Drama
Short-form, mobile-first drama built for vertical platforms and fast-scrolling audiences.
05
Brand Promotional Videos
Commercial films that introduce, explain, and sell — built around a brand's actual voice.
06
Photography & Visual Content
Product, fashion, and campaign photography that carries a shoot's story into a still frame.
Network
